# 01-Upload an avatar [PUT]

`PUT /api/v4/user/avatar`

Uploads an avatar for the currently authenticated user. This feature was introduced in GitLab 17.0.

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "avatar": string (required), // The avatar file (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 200 - OK

Schema (application/json):
```json
{
  "avatar_url": string,
}
```

#### 400 - Bad Request
